name: Quench Lance
description: Convert 3[burn] on enemy into 3[bleed]. Deal 4([str]) damage per [bleed] on enemy. Apply 2[burn]([int]).

name: Pyre Surge
description: Add 2 to every [burn] on enemy ([int]). For 8 seconds: double [fire] damage on enemy.

name: Magma Welling
description: Gain 14[armor]([vit]). Apply 8[burn]([int]).

name: Phoenix Aura
description: Heal 10([spi]). For 12 seconds: if you have less then 50%[HP], gain 18[armor].

name: Misted Cadence
description: Heal 9([spi]). Haste 25% for 8 seconds. Gain 3[mana].

name: Brine Bedrock
description: Heal 10([spi]). Vengeance: apply 3[poison].

name: Cinder Squall
description: Apply 3[slow]([int]) to all enemies. Every enemy with at least 5[slow] is stunned for 1[stun]([int]). Deal 2([int]) damage per [slow] on enemy.

name: Squall Aura
description: Heal 6([spi]). Haste 25% for 8 seconds. Gain 4[mana].

name: Dust Plague
description: Gain 8[armor]([vit]). For 12 seconds: every 2.5 seconds apply 1[slow]([int]) to all enemies; when an enemy has at least 5[slow], apply 1[stun]([int]).

name: Magma Vow
description: Gain 14[armor]([vit]). Vengeance: deal 14 Pierce.

name: Bog Catalyst
description: Apply 2[poison]([int]). Then double the [poison] on enemy.

name: Standing Stone
description: Gain 16[armor]([vit]). Brace: heal 8. Haste 10% for 8 seconds.

name: Steaming Plague
description: Apply 3[poison]([int]) to all enemies. If an enemy already has [poison]: apply 2 more ([int]).

name: Alchemic Drain
description: Heal 4([spi]) per [poison] consumed.

name: Sandfury
description: Deal 8([str]) twice to all enemies. Deal 2 Pierce per [slow] on enemy.

name: Marsh Squall
description: Exhaust. 50% of enemy's [poison] spreads to up to 4 enemies. Then deal 4([int]) Pierce per [poison] consumed to all enemies.

name: Cinder Thrust
description: Deal 10([str]) twice. Apply 2[burn].

name: Soaking Blade
description: Deal 12([str]). Apply 2[poison]. If enemy has [poison]: +7 damage.

name: Galekick
description: Deal 7([str]) twice to all enemies. Apply 2[slow].

name: Concussive Smash
description: If enemy is [stun]: deal 6([str]) more. Deal 14([str]). Apply 2[stun]([int]) and 3[slow].

name: Pyric Bulwark
description: Gain 12[armor]([vit]). For 14 seconds: every time you gain at least 4[armor], apply 1[burn]([int]).

name: Stagnant Bulwark
description: Gain 10[armor]([vit]). For 12 seconds: every 2 seconds apply 1[poison]([int]).

name: Stormgate
description: Gain 14[armor]([vit]). Haste 15% for 10 seconds.

name: Stoneward Reprisal
description: Gain 8[armor]([vit]). Brace: apply 2[stun].
